description: If your brand’s audience is pet owners, they’ll love seeing this fun email pop up in their inbox. Created by designer Yuliana Pandelieva, the Pet Shop Labor Day Offer email template is a product promotion email that you can use to advertise a special offer. This pet store email template wishes readers a happy Labor Day and includes enough space for multiple CTA’s promoting your products. Adorable photos of dogs and cats round out the message. Use this Labor Day email template to advertise your pet store or pet company and make more sales. The template is free to design with the BEE editor. When you’re finished designing, you can export the email to one of a dozen separate email service providers — including Sendinblue, HubSpot and Klaviyo.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
